CommunityApplications.Profile: Obsidian Sync Station keeps an Obsidian vault continuously synced on your server using Obsidian's official headless Sync client — no LiveSync/CouchDB and no VNC/GUI container. It adds a LAN-only web UI, choice of continuous or interval sync, optional local tar.gz backups with retention, an off-box snapshot mirror, encrypted off-site backups via restic (local or cloud), one-click restore, and ntfy notifications. Independent, unofficial project (not affiliated with Obsidian); requires an active Obsidian Sync subscription. Support and issues: https://github.com/benjaminmue/obsidian-sync-station/issues
